textByHash.ddde21a2aef1d4d75ab80ca1e7b29de5249d2ebd: Hello, stranger. Are you here for the fight arena?
textByHash.72d57e9cd6ef2040115a7da01283fdf0476f8405: Inside? Are you sure about that? Only Khazard guards are allowed in there. Unless you know where to get some of their armour, you won't be visiting anyone.
textByHash.3d840cbff8cf6f59a42481f1510c9ed65a966636: Hello there. I hear the Servil family are fighting soon. Should be very entertaining.
textByHash.53388cddbc7e1977170560194ebac5b7957fa89d: Hello there. I hear Khazard's got some great fights lined up today. I can't wait!
textByHash.d3c6573b64e0f75d2bba20edebe65174f757fafb: Hello, stranger. I hear Khazard's got some great fights lined up today. I can't wait!
textByHash.432ba572cf88c7d5ac91a7b18e97ec57d7a1500e: Hey, you're the one from the arena! That was some great fighting!
textByHash.e4b7d2b5dbb5f6564cb11f9f702fb3557bfd2918: Hey, you're the one who beat Bouncer! Amazing!
textByHash.ad7a4f9799a5c27b4378e625299692ad143db071: Can't say I do. Maybe try in the bar?
textByHash.39bfe3ffb602e471c92443bd11bdf8f075268e81: Hello, stranger. Are you here for the fight arena? Apparently, there're some rich folk fighting tomorrow. Should be entertaining.
